_note: Route template — the route is YOURS to write (owner decision, plan changelog 2026-07-17): edit this file freely, the overlay hot-reloads it on save and shows validation errors in the panel. Steps match by areaId when known (see data/areas/en.json; the dev 🐞 panel shows the id of every zone you enter) or by zone display name until you learn the id. Step types: quest | waypoint | trial | town | boss | kill | enter | hint. 'rewardHint: true' marks quest-reward steps for the P3 gem panel. Keep step ids stable — progress is saved against them.
name: Act 1

steps.text: Clear the beach, kill Hillock, enter Lioneye's Watch
Lioneye's Watch: pick your reward gem, then head out
The Coast: grab the waypoint, continue to the Mud Flats
hints: Tidal Island (Hailrake, medicine chest) is optional

steps.text: The Mud Flats: collect the 3 glyphs from the rhoa nests
The Submerged Passage: push through toward The Ledge
The Ledge: waypoint, keep going — extend this route from here on
hints: This step matches by zone name — replace with its areaId once you've entered it (🐞 panel shows it)
